title: mallotus pallidus
intro: Mallotus pallidus, also known as the yellow varnish tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mallotus pallidus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for their medicinal properties.
